templates.name: If I have two separate returns, can I send them back together in one package?
templates.content: Unfortunately not. When a return is initiated, a specific tracking number is generated and assigned to that order number. By sending both orders back in one package, only one of these tracking numbers will be scanned by the courier and appear as if the other has not yet been shipped back to us.

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! We don't have any specific discounts like that but if it helps, you can check out the items we have on sale here: https://www.shoprumored.com/collections/sale

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss wholesale is to email us directly at info@shoprumored.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Customer Support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at info@shoprumours.com. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Return Policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here - https://www.shoprumours.com/policies/refund-policy

templates.name: Shipping Time
templates.content: Our processing time takes 1-2 business days and we usually ship via USPS, UPS, and DHL. Once shipped, it will take 3-5 business days for domestic orders, and 5-10 business days for international orders.

templates.name: Can I return an item marked final sale?
templates.content: All items marked Final Sale cannot be returned for a refund or store credit, or exchanged for a different size, color, or style.

templates.name: Where are your items made / manufactured?
templates.content: Our clothing is designed in the U.S. and manufactured in China. We are committed to ethical standards in our business and product supply chain. We only work with suppliers and partners who share our commitment to transparency and accountability.

templates.name: How do I start a return?
templates.content: You can start your return here: https://returns.shoprumored.com/#/

templates.name: Where are you located?
templates.content: We're based in the iconic New York City. Our fulfillment center is based in New Jersey.

templates.name: When will I receive my refund?
templates.content:
Once your return is received and inspected, we will notify you if your return is accepted. This process can take up to 5 business days from the date your return tracking information shows "Delivered."

If your return is accepted, your refund will be processed and applied to the original payment method. Note that refunds can take up to 7-10 business days to appear back to your financial institution dependent on the processing speed of your financial institution.

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: We don't currently have a store but definitely keep an eye out.

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship
templates.content: We don't have any opportunities right now, but we love seeing how you style our pieces, so tag us in your posts for a chance to be featured on our Instagram @rumored_.

templates.name: Sizing (clothes)
templates.content: Happy to help! I'd recommend taking a look at our size chart on each product page as well as the additional information noted in the description of each item. If you're still unsure, just let me know!

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: We don't offer phone support right now but I'd be happy to help you over text, let me know what I can do for you!

templates.name: Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG here: https://www.instagram.com/rumored_/

templates.name: Size Chart: Women - Clothes
templates.content: You can take a look at our women's size chart here: https://www.shoprumored.com/pages/size-guide

templates.name: Sales Collection
templates.content: You can take a look at our sale collection here: https://www.shoprumored.com/collections/sale

templates.name: Gift card limit
templates.content: At this time only one gift card can be used per order.

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: Unfortunately, we can't make any changes, updates, or cancellations to orders once they have been placed. I'm sorry for the inconvenience.

templates.name: Do you offer free returns?
templates.content: We offer free return shipping on exchange orders! For returns, we charge a flat rate of $9.95 which will be deducted from your refund or credit amount.

templates.name: Free Shipping
templates.content: We offer free shipping on domestic orders over $150. Maybe you can add something else to reach the minimum?
